2604.08046.title: Guaranteeing Knowledge Integration with Joint Decoding for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
2604.08046.paper_summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) significantly enhances Large Language Models (LLMs) by providing access to external knowledge. However, current research primarily focuses on retrieval quality, often overlooking the critical ''integration bottleneck'': even when relevant documents are retrieved, LLMs frequently fail to utilize them effectively due to conflicts with their internal parametric knowledge. In this paper, we argue that implicitly resolving this conflict in a single generation pass is suboptimal. We introduce GuarantRAG, a framework that explicitly decouples reasoning from evidence integration. First, we generate an ''Inner-Answer'' based solely on parametric knowledge to capture the model's reasoning flow. Second, to guarantee faithful evidence extraction, we generate a ''Refer-Answer'' using a novel Contrastive DPO objective. This objective treats the parametric Inner-Answer as a negative constraint and the retrieved documents as positive ground truth, forcing the model to suppress internal hallucinations in favor of external evidence during this phase. Finally, rather than naive concatenation or using the DPO trained model directly, we propose a joint decoding mechanism that dynamically fuses the logical coherence of the Inner-Answer with the factual precision of the Refer-Answer at the token level. Experiments on five QA benchmarks demonstrate that GuarantRAG improves accuracy by up to 12.1% and reduces hallucinations by 16.3% compared to standard and dynamic RAG baselines.
2604.08046.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）顯著提升了大型語言模型（LLMs），通過提供對外部知識的訪問。然而，目前的研究主要集中在檢索質量上，往往忽視了關鍵的「整合瓶頸」：即使檢索到相關文檔，LLMs 也經常因與其內部參數知識的衝突而無法有效利用這些文檔。在本文中，我們主張在單次生成過程中隱式解決這一衝突是次優的。我們引入了 GuarantRAG，一個明確將推理與證據整合解耦的框架。首先，我們僅基於參數知識生成一個「內部答案」，以捕捉模型的推理流程。其次，為了保證忠實的證據提取，我們使用一種新穎的對比 DPO 目標生成「參考答案」。這一目標將參數內部答案視為負約束，將檢索到的文檔視為正確的真實情況，迫使模型在此階段壓抑內部幻覺，以支持外部證據。最後，我們提出了一種聯合解碼機制，而不是簡單的串聯或直接使用 DPO 訓練的模型，該機制在令牌層面動態融合內部答案的邏輯一致性與參考答案的事實精確性。在五個 QA 基準上的實驗表明，GuarantRAG 對比於標準和動態 RAG 基準，準確率提高了最多 12.1%，並將幻覺減少了 16.3%。
2604.08046.author: Zhengyi Zhao et.al.
2604.08046.authors: Zhengyi Zhao, Shubo Zhang, Zezhong Wang, Yuxi Zhang, Huimin Wang, Yutian Zhao, Yefeng Zheng, Binyang Li, Kam-Fai Wong, Xian Wu
